title: Universal Skill Execution Contract is live
summary: Update your linux-admin plugin to get /linux-admin:universal-contract-guardian-expert and the repository-wide 8-rule execution contract for safer skills, architecture fit checks, backup planning, rollback planning, and token-optimized bounded output.
highlights: New docs/UNIVERSAL_SKILL_EXECUTION_CONTRACT.md defines the 8 mandatory rules for all current and future skills.
Plugin package metadata is aligned to 1.17.39 with 112 expert skills.
